welcome.title: Welcome to MentorMinds
welcome.body: Thank you for joining MentorMinds. We're excited to help you on your learning journey.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email Address
verifyEmail.body: Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
verifyEmail.link: Or copy and paste this link: {{link}}

passwordReset.title: Reset Your Password
passwordReset.body: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to set a new password.
passwordReset.link: Or copy and paste this link: {{link}}
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.

bookingConfirmed.title: Booking Confirmed
bookingConfirmed.body: Your booking with {{mentorName}} has been confirmed.

bookingReminder.title: Booking Reminder
bookingReminder.body: Reminder: Your session with {{mentorName}} starts in {{time}}.

bookingCancelled.title: Booking Cancelled
bookingCancelled.body: Your booking with {{mentorName}} on {{date}} has been cancelled.
bookingCancelled.refund: A refund will be processed if applicable.

paymentFailed.title: Payment Failed
paymentFailed.body: Payment failed for booking #{{bookingId}}. Please try again.

newMessage.title: New Message
newMessage.body: You have a new message from {{senderName}}.

reviewReceived.title: New Review Received
reviewReceived.body: You received a new review from {{reviewerName}}.

sessionSummary.title: Session Summary Available
sessionSummary.body: The AI-generated summary for your session with {{mentorName}} is now available.
